hero.desc: Passionate about turning ideas into accessible, functional and modern interfaces, focused on user experience.

about.title: About
about.origin: I have a dedicated, disciplined profile motivated by constant learning. My journey started outside tech — as a musician, music teacher and educator, playing at churches and weddings, and also in customer service, where I developed communication, organization and teamwork skills.
about.turn: Encouraged by a friend in the field, I became interested in technology and creating solutions that impact people. This led me to technical education at ETEC, with structured exposure to programming logic, web development and interface design.
about.now: Focused on growing as a dev, practicing HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, React Native and modern frameworks, with version control via Git/GitHub. Goal: start a degree in Systems Analysis and Development and enter the market contributing to projects that make a difference.

projects.title: My
projects.subtitle: Check out some of my course and personal projects.

mygluco-site.title: Website – MyGluco
mygluco-site.description: Landing page for the MyGluco system, focused on usability and user experience. Showcases features, benefits and diabetes awareness.
mygluco-site.detailsDescription: HTML structure, styles with Tailwind via CDN, behavior with JavaScript and backend/services with Firebase.

mygluco-app.title: Mobile App – MyGluco
mygluco-app.description: Mobile app for diabetes management: track glucose, meals, activities and medications with charts, reports and personalized notifications.
mygluco-app.detailsDescription: React Native + Firebase for auth and data. Node.js/NPM for dependencies, Expo Go for testing and Figma for early designs.

etec.title: Classroom Projects – ETEC
etec.description: Mix of projects focused on programming logic using HTML, CSS and JS. Developed at ETEC: exercise lists, login and registration systems.
etec.detailsDescription: HTML structure, CSS styles and JavaScript behavior. Focus on programming logic, page navigation, login and local storage.

kivy-app.title: Mobile App with Python (Kivy)
kivy-app.description: System built in Python using the Kivy framework. Includes login and data query features. Introductory project on mobile app structure.
kivy-app.detailsDescription: Python with Kivy framework for cross-platform mobile interfaces. Focus on logic, screen navigation and widgets.
